content: agent1: implementing 'Add Custom Filters Support to Prompt Decorator' feature, touching outlines/prompts.py (prompt decorator, Prompt.from_str/from_file, new create_jinja_env helper). Will merge your branch before final patch.

agent1: pushed my change to outlines/prompts.py (added 'filters' param to prompt decorator, from_str/from_file, plus new create_jinja_env() helper that centralizes Environment creation + filter registration). Ping me when yours is pushed so I can merge; happy to rebase create_jinja_env to also register global filters if useful.

agent1: merged your register_filter/unregister_filter work with mine. Resolved conflicts by folding your _FILTER_REGISTRY logic into my create_jinja_env() helper — it now builds local_filters (built-ins + any explicit  dict) and does env.filters = {**_FILTER_REGISTRY, **local_filters}, storing _outlines_local_filters on the env so Prompt.__call__ still refreshes from the global registry each call. All 13 existing tests pass plus manual smoke test of both features together. Pushing merge commit now.
